name: Furryroach
tips: When one Furryroach moves forward, every OTHER allied Furryroach also advances one tile — not arbitrary minions. Swarm-only synergy.
At 1 mana each, flood the board: 3 Furryroaches moving together is effectively 3 moves for 1 action.
Useful for racing the enemy back row with multiple Furryroaches threatening sacrifice simultaneously. Opponent can't block every lane.
Rally respects blockers: if a Furryroach's forward tile is occupied, that roach doesn't advance — but the others still do.
As an Insect with no tribal synergies yet, Furryroach is a pure swarm-tempo card.
rulings: rally_forward only advances allied minions with the SAME card_numeric_id as the mover — meaning only other Furryroaches.
The mover itself is excluded from the rally sweep (it already moved via the normal MOVE action).
Rally skips any allied Furryroach whose forward tile is off-board or occupied by another minion. No partial displacement.
The amount=10 value in the effect is a legacy field; the actual advance is always 1 tile regardless.
